briefdescription.para: Get real array value from configuration.
Get number of species from configuration.
Get maximum number of species from configuration.
Get number of emission categories from configuration.
Get number of emission species from configuration.
Parse YAML data into structured configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (this, filename, chem_state, error_mgr, grid, rc, num_species)
memberdef.name: config_manager_load_and_init_species

briefdescription.para: Load complete species data with all properties from YAML file and initialize ChemState.

detaileddescription.para: This enhanced method loads species configuration including all properties such as molecular weight, type flags, background concentrations, etc., and initializes the provided ChemState with the loaded species data. Based on the YAML structure in test_species.yml.

parameterdescription.para: ChemState to initialize with species data
Grid geometry for concentration array initialization

briefdescription.para: Helper subroutine to load species properties from YAML.

parameterdescription.para: Path to the species data in YAML

briefdescription.para: Get Mie data and initialize ChemState Mie arrays.

detaileddescription.para: This subroutine reads the mie/files section from the configuration, loads the Mie data files, and initializes the ChemState Mie arrays.

parameterdescription.para: ChemState object to initialize with Mie data

briefdescription.para: Find category mapping for a specific category.
Apply emission mapping to map emission field to chemical species.
Get emission mapping configuration for specific category.
Load emission-to-species mapping configuration from file.

parameterdescription.para: Optional ChemState for immediate index resolution

briefdescription.para: Generic YAML text parser for discovering items in a section This function reads the YAML file as plain text and extracts item names by parsing the structure line by line, looking for keys with ':' under the section.

parameterdescription.para: Section name to search for items
Array to store discovered item names

briefdescription.para: Discover items in a nested YAML section (supports arbitrary depth paths)

detaileddescription.para: This function discovers direct child items in any nested YAML section. It supports arbitrary nesting depth and flexible indentation.

Examples:
"processes/extemis" -> finds anthro, point, fire, fengsha
"processes/extemis/anthro" -> finds activate, scale_factor, source_file, etc.
"mie/files" with mode 'key_value_pairs' -> finds "SS: opticsBands_SS.v3_3.RRTMG.nc"

parameterdescription.para: Array to store discovered item names

briefdescription.para: Parse a YAML path into components (e.g., "processes/extemis" -> ["processes", "extemis"])

memberdef.argsstring: (field_name, indent_level, path_components, n_path_components, current_depth, path_indents, path_matched, target_indent, in_target_section)
memberdef.name: update_flexible_path_tracking

briefdescription.para: Update path tracking state while parsing YAML with flexible indentation.
Update runtime configuration from loaded configs.
Load run phases configuration from YAML.

detaileddescription.para: Parses the run_phases section from the loaded YAML configuration and populates the ConfigDataTyperun_phases and ConfigDataTyperun_phase_processes arrays.
Expected YAML format: run_phases: phase_name: process1 process2 process3

memberdef.argsstring: (config_mgr, process_name, phase_name, process_config, process_index, local_priority, rc)
memberdef.name: populate_process_config

briefdescription.para: Helper subroutine to populate ProcessConfigType with flexible YAML reading Reads configuration values from YAML first, then assigns defaults if not found.

parameterdescription.para: Process name to read configuration for

briefdescription.para: Helper subroutine to populate run phase metadata with flexible YAML reading Reads phase configuration values from YAML first, then assigns defaults if not found.

parameterdescription.para: Phase name to read configuration for

briefdescription.para: Parse space-separated string into array elements.
Remove duplicate strings from an array.
